response.overview: Three close friends, Kassandra Kelly (Ivy), Brenda Phillips (Karma), and Kristen Connor (Vanessa), on a little getaway decide to get some real dick since their husbands are out playing golf. It's been a while since they really had a good fucking so they go all out and team up on the neighbor. Pay attention to your surroundings, you never know if it's 3 hot and horny babes looking to get fucked all at the same time by the next man that crosses their path.
response.title: Summer Vacation
